daily.topThemeBody: ISTELive 26 keeps generating skills coverage: EdTech Magazine and EdSurge unpack the six-role "AI-Ready Graduate" and a "relational intelligence" recap, experts urge leaders to defend E-Rate broadband funding, Inside Higher Ed's RAISE US targets workforce reskilling, and 1EdTech advances research on scaling digital credentials.
